rows.label: qev025703_MSG0001
rows.name:
What? Do you have some business with me, perhaps?
I cannot discuss work matters as they are corporate secrets, but
I will tell you anything about myself, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Aalis for her three sizes.

rows.label: qev025703_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what kind of work she does.

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0002
rows.name:
Three sizes refers to a physical measurement method
used by Earthlings, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0003
rows.name:
I have the measurements taken when I started working
at my current company, so please, take them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0004
rows.name: ...Still, what exactly do you plan to use this numerical data for, I wonder?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Underwear?
Is that the name of a new weapon, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0006
rows.name:
I don't really understand, but
I hope the development goes well, don't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0007
rows.name:
I am employed as an engineer at a company
that produces armaments for Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0008
rows.name:
Yes, anything beyond that is a corporate secret,
so please allow me to keep it classified.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0009
rows.name:
Come to think of it, ever since Panyal arrived in NLA,
she's been saying mysterious things about fashion this and fashion that, hasn't she...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0010
rows.name: Is underwear something related to that, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0011
rows.name:
Is the development of the ultimate weapon, "Underwear,"
proceeding smoothly?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0012
rows.name:
When I asked a colleague about Underwear,
I was told it's a weapon that instantly defeats Earthling men
just by showing it to them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025703_MSG0013
rows.name:
...What? The development failed?
That's a shame... No, considering it's such a terrifying weapon,
perhaps I should be glad, shouldn't I...[ST:wait ]
